name: Thinkpath Inc.
summary: Thinkpath Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides engineering services in North America. The company's engineering and design services include design/build, design engineering, finite element analysis, and forensic engineering services; computer-aided design services, including scanning, digitizing and vectorization, file conversion, database development and management, and solid/3D modeling; engineering, technical publication, and project management; and catalogues, translations, data conversion, and database management services. The company offers its services to defense, aerospace, automotive, material handling, air pollution control, medical devices/health care, and electronics industries. The company was formerly known as Thinkpath.com, Inc. and changed its name to Thinkpath, Inc. in 2001. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Brampton, Canada.
